center.name: Arthur Hay, 9th Marquess of Tweeddale
center.summary: Arthur Hay, 9th Marquess of Tweeddale是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括棕背田鸡、Chirruping nightjar、Southern silvery kingfisher等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The chirruping nightjar or kayumanggi nightjar (Caprimulgus griseatus) is a species of nightjar found in the Philippines

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The southern silvery kingfisher (Ceyx argentatus) is a species of bird in the family Alcedinidae that is endemic to the Philippines found in Mindanao and Basilan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-rumped falcon (Neohierax insignis) is a species of bird of prey in the family Falconidae native to Indochina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The spotted elachura or spotted wren-babbler (Elachura formosa) is a species of passerine bird found in the forests of the eastern Himalayas and Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-tailed crake (Zapornia bicolor) is a species of bird in the family Rallidae. It is found in Bangladesh, Bhutan, China, India, Laos, Myanmar, Nepal, Thailand and Vietnam
